data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. ELEVATE has some solid form under his belt and proved too classy last time to win by 1.75 lengths at Warragul in a handy 26.57 beating Mighty Hercules. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings five times from eight attempts. Looks the one to beat. 8. SODA BEN did a good job to finish third last time out over 450m at this track (26.56) in a Grade 5, the second top-three finish on the trot. Can hit the frame this time. 1. DOONGALLA GEM has been settling off the speed lately, finishing fifth (22.79) last time in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 at this track. Has an impeccable record here at this journey. Great chance to atone. 2. ASTON JOPLIN is in form and must include among the chances.","runners":[6,8,1,2],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: BALLARAT-R7-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
